untranslatable_reason: Broadening pattern requires explicit detection of expanding upper and lower bands (higher highs AND higher lows, or lower lows AND lower highs on alternating swings), and pattern height comparison to median. These geometric pattern properties cannot be reliably expressed with the available indicators. The 'watch for weakness approximately one month after breakout' rule is temporal/discretionary rather than indicator-based. Conversion uses breakout signals and overbought/oversold exits as proxies, but the core pattern recognition is not fully translatable.
